task_completion.description: Verify the survey is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Streaming Services Consumer Evaluation Q4 2024' in the LimeSurvey header, survey list, or overview page.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Platform Usage' group and Multiple Choice question are created with the 7 streaming services.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group named 'Platform Usage' containing a Multiple Choice question. The sub-questions list must include Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Disney+, HBO Max, Hulu, Apple TV+, and Peacock.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Service Satisfaction' and 'Recommendation Likelihood' groups and their Array questions are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for two question groups ('Service Satisfaction' and 'Recommendation Likelihood'), each containing an Array (5 point choice) question. Both must share the same 7 streaming service sub-questions.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'array_filter' attribute is configured on both Array questions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Logic' or 'Display' settings for the Array questions. The 'Array filter' field must be populated with the exact question code of the Multiple Choice question from the first group.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey is configured to accept anonymous responses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Participant settings' or survey summary page. The 'Anonymized responses' setting should be toggled to 'On' or 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a green 'Active' status badge, a 'Stop this survey' button, or an activation success message on the survey overview page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the LimeSurvey web GUI to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, not terminal commands, API scripts, or database injections.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually inputted the settings into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing sub-questions and configuring the array_filter within the LimeSurvey form fields, rather than pasting a pre-made text file.

integrity.description: Verify the UI reflects genuine application state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The LimeSurvey interface should look standard without obvious signs of HTML DOM manipulation (e.g., faking the 'Active' badge or survey title).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title Keywords: 'Streaming', 'Evaluation'. Required Question Types: 'M' (Multiple Choice) and 'F' (Array). Minimum Subquestions: 7 (Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, Disney+, HBO Max, Hulu, Apple TV+, Peacock). Required Attribute: 'array_filter' must be set on both Array questions to match the Multiple Choice question code.
